ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squad_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the squad member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the squad member (e.g., Squad Leader, Engineer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the squad member (e.g., Alive, Dead) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the squad member */,
  "sl_distance" REAL /* Distance from the squad leader */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the squad member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the squad member */,
  "enlistment_date" TEXT /* Date of enlistment */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Military rank of the squad member */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit to which the squad member belongs */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_records" TEXT /* Relevant medical information */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session */,
  "next_training_due" TEXT /* Date of the next required training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squad_members_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "required_training" TEXT /* Training required for the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "min_rank" TEXT /* Minimum rank required for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the location */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector" TEXT /* Name of the last inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad member being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the squad member */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the status update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the status update */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_updates_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES squad_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the mission took place */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the mission */,
  "commander" TEXT /* Name of the mission commander */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the mission */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred during the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squad_missions" (
  "squad_mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad mission entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad member participating in the mission */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the squad member is part of */,
  "role_during_mission" TEXT /* Specific role the member had during the mission */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the member during the mission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the member's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squad_missions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES squad_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squad_missions_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualty_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty report */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad member reported as a casualty */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission during which the casualty occurred */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was made */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details surrounding the casualty incident */,
  "cause_of_injury" TEXT /* Cause of the injury or death */,
  "medical_response_time" TEXT /* Time it took for medical response */,
  "treatment_location" TEXT /* Location where treatment was provided */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Recovery status of injured members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualty_reports_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualty_reports_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES squad_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Officer, Squad Leader) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, update status) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
